What We Do

Three pillars.
One mission.

Onea Africa is built around a simple idea: that people and businesses thrive when they can connect, be heard, and have meaningful conversations. Everything we do flows from that.

Work with us →
01
Connect

Get Connected.
Stay Connected.

From fibre to your home or office, to IT infrastructure that keeps your business running — we handle the technical layer so you can focus on what you do best.

  • Fibre Connectivity (via Openserve)
  • IT Infrastructure & Managed Services
  • Cloud Solutions
  • ERP Implementation
  • Hardware & Software Licensing
  • Network Cabling & Installation
Get connected →
02
Communicate

Be Seen.
Be Heard.

Digital presence isn't optional anymore. We build websites, run campaigns, create content, and manage media — all aligned to your brand and your goals.

  • Website Design & Development
  • Digital Marketing
  • Creative & Content Production
  • Social Media Management
  • Media Buying & Planning
  • Brand Identity & Activation
Build your presence →
03
Converse

Tell Your Story.
Own the Narrative.

Good PR is about more than press releases. It's about building trust, managing perception, and making sure the right people hear the right things at the right time.

  • Public Relations & Comms Strategy
  • Stakeholder Engagement
  • Tender Writing & Submissions
  • Media Relations
  • Corporate Communications
  • Crisis Communication
Start the conversation →
Why Onea Africa

We don't just deliver
services. We deliver outcomes.

You don't want an agency that disappears after the invoice. You want a team that's invested in what happens next. That's us.

01

End-to-End Capability

One team handles connectivity, digital presence, and communications. No handoffs, no gaps, no "that's not our department."

02

B-BBEE Level 1

We're a Level 1 contributor — which means working with us counts toward your transformation goals without compromising on quality.

03

Built for South Africa

Based in Pretoria. Thinking nationally. We understand the local landscape — the regulations, the market, the nuance.

04

Proven Partners

We work with established networks — Openserve, Telkom, Supersonic, Home Connect — so our quality has infrastructure behind it.

Connect · Fibre

Fibre internet for homes and businesses across South Africa.

We resell fibre on the Openserve network through multiple ISP partners — so you get options, not a take-it-or-leave-it. Fast installation, reliable support, no headaches.

Telkom Supersonic Home Connect ND Connect

Residential Starter
Popular Get this →

Residential / SME

50 Mbps

Enterprise / Custom
Talk to us →

Connecting people since 2016.

Onea Africa started as a networking services business in Pretoria. Over the years, we realised that connectivity alone wasn't enough — businesses needed to be visible, and their voices needed to be heard. So we grew into three pillars: Connect, Communicate, Converse. Today, we're a full-service technology and digital agency with the reach, credentials, and team to deliver on all three.

9+ Years in operation
3 Core service pillars
L1 B-BBEE status
100% South African owned
About Us

We build the infrastructure for meaningful connection.

Our vision is to enable individuals and businesses to connect, exchange ideas, and create real value together. Not just online — in the real world, with real impact.

  • 🌱
    Rooted in purpose We're not here to tick boxes. We're here to help businesses grow and communities connect.
  • 🤝
    Partners, not vendors We invest in understanding your world. Your success is what makes us successful.
  • ⚡
    Results-first thinking We move fast, we're direct, and we focus on what actually moves the needle for you.
Work with us →
Insights & Resources

We write about what we know.

Connectivity, digital marketing, communications — if it's in our world, we'll share what we've learned. No fluff, just useful.

Connectivity

Why Fibre Beats WiFi Extenders Every Time (and What to Do About Dead Zones)
